nasb.text: they gave Him wine to drink mixed with gall; and after tasting it, He was unwilling to drink.

esv.text: they offered him wine to drink, mixed with gall, but when he tasted it, he would not drink it.

cnv.text: 他們把苦膽調和的酒給他喝，他嘗了卻不肯喝。

ccb.text: 士兵给耶稣喝掺了苦胆汁的酒，祂尝了一口，不肯喝。

csbs.text: 他们把胆汁调和的酒给耶稣喝。耶稣尝了，不肯喝。
